properties.Test Case: Make a derivative of "Stacked Diacritics and Vowel Length". For Pages 1-4 follow instructions at top of page. (N.B. "row" should read "column".) - Page 5, click on Set up Stages and verify # of matching words with screenshots (stage 1-5).
properties.Steps:
-Make a derivative of "Stacked Diacritics and Vowel Length". For Pages 1-4 follow instructions at top of page. (N.B. "row" should read "column".)
- Page 5, click on Set up Stages and verify # of matching words with screenshots (stage 1-5).

properties.Test Case: add a new text-only page. Set Stage to 1. Open the "Generate a letter and word list report" and copy a word from stage 1 --> no highlighting. Copy a word from "New Decodable Words" for stage 2 --> should get highlighted. Repeat for other stages, ensuring words from the correct level (or below) are not highlighted and words from a higher stage are highlighted).
properties.Steps: - add a new text-only page. Set Stage to 1. Open the "Generate a letter and word list report" and copy a word from stage 1 --> no highlighting. Copy a word from "New Decodable Words" for stage 2 --> should get highlighted. Repeat for other stages, ensuring words from the correct level (or below) are not highlighted and words from a higher stage are highlighted).

properties.Test Case: Please test this area similar to how it will actually be used. How it will *not* be used is to create stages and levels and then go use them. Rather, you have to make a BloomPack, clear your machine of the previous stuff (including AppData\Local\SIL\Bloom *-foo.json), then install the Bloompack, make a new collection for 'foo', and make uses of it.
